title: Picasso: A Rebel in Paris - Story of a Life and a Museum
original_title: Picasso a Parigi - Storia di una vita e di un museo
overview: The documentary was created to mark the 50th anniversary of Pablo Picasso's death. Inspired by his famous quote, "Painting isn't an aesthetic operation; it's a form of magic" the film focuses on Picasso's life and legacy, centered around the Picasso Museum in Paris. It explores his deep connection to the city, his personal complexities, and new aspects of his work recently uncovered by historians.
